title: Hellay's 3D Bows
description: A resource pack that changes the 2D model of bows to a cutom 3D model
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba87ee622667bd8a0ee0ab6c5292812b9c937a79.png)
# Hellay 3D Bows!
#### **Are you bored of the flat 2d bows in minecraft? well I introduce you to 3D Bows! with this pack bows(and soon crossbows) get a 3D model! And thats not all!You can change the model of your favorite bow just by renaming it!**

## **My plans for this pack:**
- **Adding more CIT models that change by name or bow enchantments**
- **Anding some other stuff...**


## FAQ

-  ### **What does this pack do?**
   **This pack changes the bow's 2d item models to custom 3d models**
-  ### **What versions does it support?**
   **It almost supports avery version that supports resource packs but the game will say it's for newer versions if you use 1.20 or below**
Note that CIT features only work with pack version 1.1.0 and above.
- ### **Does it require any additional mods or resource packs?**
   **v1.0.0 and v1.0.1 work in vanilla just fine BUT you need CIT Resawn or Optifine for versions 1.1.0 and above**
- ### where can I report any issues that I have?
   **You can communicate with me and report bugs and issues in the discord server**
- ### **Can I modify this pack?**
   **Yes , if it's for personal use feel free to change anything you want.But if you want to publish the modified pack or put my pack in a modpack or showing it in a video pls mantion my name or put a link to my pack**

## **list of the names that change your bows model:**
#### **Note that you should exatly write what is written down here for your bows model to change**

**Ice Bow**:

![ice bow image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30418a8eb6a6f9c1d5fbf2f4b44aa5b3dd7e7257.png)
